verdict: Chaos detectors validated on genuine chaos (Hénon–Heiles box-dim 1.34; di-hole λ 2.09). Our FD-noise Lyapunov false-positive independently reproduced + fixed by ansatz §101. leg J's no-chaos null rests on the roundoff-immune box-dimension, a validated detector. MN bound chaos unreachable by the equatorial launcher (launch-data limit, not detector).
